info.title: Deposit Service API
info.description: Cross-chain deposit processing service with automatic token bridging and gas sponsorship

contract.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

outputToken.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

OutputTokenRule.description: Destination token routing rule. Matches deposits by source token attributes and selects the target-chain output token.

OutputTokenRuleMatch.description: Source-token match criteria. Rules may match by source chain, source token address, source symbol, or a combination.

maxPriceDeviationBps.description: Maximum allowed price deviation in basis points for stablecoin-to-stablecoin bridges. Defaults to 200 (2%) if not set.

minAmount.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

maxAmount.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

DepositWhitelist.description: Per-source-chain deposit allowlist keyed by CAIP-2 chain identifiers (for example "eip155:8453"). Each key maps to allowed source tokens and optional min/max amount limits in raw token units.

depositWhitelist.description: Per-source-chain deposit allowlist keyed by CAIP-2 chain identifiers, each mapping allowed tokens to optional raw-unit min/max limits.

address.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

factory.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

factoryData.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

sessionDigest.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

signature.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

contract.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

outputToken.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

Target.description: Destination target configuration. `chain` must be a CAIP-2 chain identifier such as "eip155:8453" or "solana:5eykt4UsFv8P8NJdTREpY1vzqKqZKvdp". When `postBridgeActions` are present, `token` is the token bridged into the smart account before those actions execute, and the last action `outputToken` becomes the final token delivered to `recipient`.

mint.description: Base58-encoded SPL token mint to create the Associated Token Account for

address.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

projectId.description: Target user-service project id whose failed deposits should be retried.

chain.description: Limit to a single CAIP-2 chain

errorCode.description: Limit to deposits that failed with this error code

failedAfter.description: ISO timestamp; include only deposits updated at/after this

failedBefore.description: ISO timestamp; include only deposits updated at/before this

chain.description: CAIP-2 chain identifier of the deposit (e.g. "eip155:8453")

txHash.description: Source transaction hash of the stuck deposit

account.description: Managed account address that received the deposit (EVM address or Solana public key)

token.description: Source token address. Use the zero address (0x000…000) for native transfers.

recipient.description: Address to receive the refunded tokens (EVM address or Solana public key)

amount.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

sourceAmount.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

destinationAmount.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

account.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

sourceToken.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

amount.description: Numeric string representing a bigint value

period.description: Rolling time window for aggregated stats

salt.description: Hex-encoded string (0x followed by hex characters)

contract.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

outputToken.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

ManagedTarget.description: Destination target configuration for managed accounts. `recipient` is required and specifies the address that receives the final tokens.

smartAccount.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

targetChain.description: Chain identifier as a positive integer or CAIP-2 string (e.g. "eip155:8453")

outputToken.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

signerAddress.description: Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

prices.description: USD unit price keyed by uppercased token symbol

post.summary: Fetch or backfill deposit addresses for a registered account
post.description: Return the EVM, Solana, and Tron deposit addresses for an already-registered account. Missing Solana and Tron deposit addresses are backfilled on first call (derivation and Rhino.fi mint as needed) without modifying the account config (session details, target). Idempotent on repeat.

post.summary: Create a Solana token account (ATA) for an account
post.description: Create the Solana Associated Token Account (ATA) for a registered account's Solana deposit address and an SPL mint, so transfers from senders that omit a create-ATA instruction (some CEXes) do not bounce on-chain. Allowlisted clients only. Idempotent: returns the existing ATA with created=false if it already exists. Rejects native/wrapped SOL (no ATA needed).

404.description: No Solana account registered for this address

502.description: Solana RPC or transaction submission failure

post.summary: Retry failed deposits for an account
post.description: Retry all failed deposits for a given account address. Authenticate with an `x-api-key` (write scope) or a Bearer platform token; the credential must belong to the client that registered the account.

post.summary: Operator bulk retry for failed deposits matching a filter
post.description: Operator-only endpoint. Retry every `failed` deposit for the target project that matches the supplied filter. Requires the `deposit_retry` API-key scope, a `projectId`, and at least one narrowing filter (chain, errorCode, failedAfter, failedBefore).

parameters.description: API key for authentication
parameters.name: x-api-key

parameters.name: x-api-version

400.description: Invalid request, no narrowing filter supplied, or bad API key

403.description: Forbidden - missing deposit_retry scope

get.summary: List deposits for the authenticated client
get.description: Returns the authenticated client's deposits, newest first. Supports filtering by account, status, source chain, and transaction hash. The `account` filter accepts an EVM address or a Solana public key (deposit address or swig address).

schema.description: EVM address (0x...) or Solana base58 public key

parameters.description: EVM address (0x...) or Solana base58 public key
parameters.name: account

schema.description: Filter by the account's recipient address. Aggregates deposits across every smart account that resolves to the same recipient (typically the integrator's user wallet).

parameters.description: Filter by the account's recipient address. Aggregates deposits across every smart account that resolves to the same recipient (typically the integrator's user wallet).
parameters.name: recipient

parameters.description: Maximum number of deposits to return

get.summary: List candidate quotes considered for a deposit
get.description: Returns every quote the orchestrator (or Solana bridge adapter) returned for this deposit, including which one was attempted and its terminal outcome. Scoped to the caller's tenant.

schema.description: Deposit id. Returned by GET /deposits.

403.description: API key lacks required deposits scope

404.description: Deposit not found or not owned by the caller

post.summary: Preview a bridge quote before depositing
post.description: Returns the fees and expected output for bridging `amount` of `sourceToken` from `sourceChainId` to the account's registered target, before any funds are deposited. The orchestrator quotes against the supplied amount as if the deposit wallet already held it; the result is indicative and may differ from the quote applied once a real deposit lands. EVM source chains only. Scoped to the caller's tenant.

schema.description: API key for authentication (omit when sending Authorization)

parameters.description: API key for authentication (omit when sending Authorization)
parameters.name: x-api-key

parameters.name: authorization

200.description: Indicative quote for the requested route

400.description: Malformed request body or unsupported source chain

401.description: Missing/invalid API key or expired platform bearer token

403.description: API key lacks required deposits scope

404.description: Account not found or not owned by the caller

422.description: Route cannot be quoted (token/amount not allowed by the client whitelist, unsupported token route, post-bridge-swap account, no session for the source chain, or no available routes)

post.summary: Send a test webhook to the configured URL
post.description: Sends a single webhook with fixture data to the client's configured URL. Uses the client's real webhook secret so signature verification works as in production. Envelope and persisted payload both carry `"test": true` so the receiver can filter and the dashboard can mark it.
